hero.headline: Build Your Engineering Team Without Slowing Down
hero.subheadline: Jeelup connects startups and companies with highly skilled engineers who work as dedicated members of your team.

problem.headline: Hiring Developers Shouldn't Slow Down Your Company
problem.intro: Growing companies face the same hiring challenges:
problem.closing: Traditional outsourcing often leads to disconnected teams and slow execution. Founders need engineers who work WITH them, not outside their company.

meet.headline: Meet Jeelup
meet.p1: Jeelup deploys skilled engineers who integrate directly into your team.
meet.p2: Instead of freelancers or distant outsourcing agencies, you work with dedicated builders who collaborate with your engineers, product managers, and founders every day.
meet.p3: Our engineers understand the pace and ownership required to build and scale modern technology products.
meet.trust: Not a freelancer. Not an agency. A team extension.

why.headline: Why Companies Choose Jeelup
why.card1Body: Our engineers understand product development cycles, iteration, and the speed required to build startups.
why.card2Body: Each engineer works as part of your team, contributing directly to your product and roadmap.
why.card3Body: Our engineers communicate fluently in Arabic, English, and French — making collaboration seamless.
why.card4Body: Traditional hiring takes months. Jeelup helps companies add engineers within days, allowing teams to move faster.

howItWorks.headline: How It Works
howItWorks.step1Body: Share your technology stack and the role you want to hire.
howItWorks.step2Body: We introduce candidates whose experience matches your needs.
howItWorks.step3Body: Your engineer joins your team and begins contributing immediately.
howItWorks.step4Body: Expand your engineering capacity as your company grows.

founder.headline: Designed for Founders and Product Builders.
founder.p1: Jeelup was built from the experience of working closely with technology startups and product teams.
founder.p2: We understand the challenges founders face:
founder.check4: Managing growth while controlling operational complexity
founder.closing: Our goal is simple: help companies build faster with the right engineers.

cta.headline: Build Your Engineering Team Faster
cta.subheadline: Tell us about your project and the type of engineers you need. Our team will help you find the right talent to accelerate your product development.
cta.microCopy: No long-term commitment required. Start with one engineer.
cta.trustLine: Jeelup represents a new generation of engineers building alongside founders.
